summary: The diff implements all three requirements (REQ-7, REQ-8, REQ-9) with comprehensive form creation, backend storage functionality, and landing page integration. All acceptance criteria are met, including field validation, design consistency, backend data types, persistent storage, and modal-based UI integration.

hallucinated_features.description: Dynamic size info fields with add/remove functionality allowing multiple dimension entries
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-7 specifies 'approximate size or scope' as a single field, but the implementation adds complex multi-entry dimension inputs with length/width/height/units and add/remove buttons
